mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Estate of the Firm of P. L. Howard and Company
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Estate of the Firm of P. L. Howard and Company J. L. Howard, Deceased P. L. Howard, surviving partner, Administrator W. L. Howard and H. S. Howard Administrators of the estate of P. L. Howard who died 09.16.1893 Recorded in Ledger Book 4, Page 235-237, in the Floyd County Courthouse.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
